title: Xtra Rich Moroccan Lamb Tagine
description: A nutty and flavorful Moroccan dish featuring sweetened condensed milk and score-fat, perfect for a lazy Sunday, and is Whole30-friendly.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the lamb shoulder with salt, black pepper, cumin, and paprika.
Heat the score-fat in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Sear the lamb shoulder until browned on all sides.
Add the onion, garlic, and ginger to the pot and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the sweetened condensed milk to the pot and stir to combine.
Cover the pot and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Braise the lamb for 2 1/2 hours, or until tender.
Remove the pot from the oven and let it cool slightly.
Serve the lamb and sauce over couscous or cauliflower rice.
